title: Valkyrien Warium
description: This mod is an Addon to Warium and Valkyrien Skies, serving as a bridge between the two mods allowing players to build vehicles such as planes, tanks, helicopters, and ships, without the complexity of Create and other VS addons.
body:
Support the Creator:

https://buymeacoffee.com/novum33

Description:

(This mod is still a work in progress and many features are not finished!)


This addon adds warium-based methods of Propulsion and Aerodynamics.

It adds Wheels and Tracks (WIP)

Propellers

Wings

Control Surfaces

Jet Engines

Landing Gear

Its own control system designed to be simple to design vehicles at a reasonable scale by directly wiring blocks together.

Alongside Warium This mod is designed and balanced exclusively for survival PVP and competitive environments, much consideration went into each feature and how competitive players will abuse such a feature.

This mod is not finished but will smooth out as it develops.

Official Disc Server: https://discord.gg/R5tZ8KZnJK
